name: search_laws
description: Semantic search across consolidated Portuguese legislation. Accepts up to 5 queries per call; results are deduplicated.

name: ask_legal_question
description: Full RAG answer: embeds the question, retrieves relevant articles, and returns a grounded answer with citations.

name: get_articles
description: Fetch full article text by act reference and article number (batched). Use after search_laws to resolve cross-references.

name: get_sources
description: List the legislation corpora currently indexed, with article and act counts and the last sync timestamp.

name: get_usage
description: Return the caller's subscription tier, billing period, and budget usage percentage.
